ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier for the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the station */,
  "maintenance_interval" TEXT /* Interval at which the station requires maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier for the sensor */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the sensor is located */,
  "parameter_measured" TEXT /* Parameter measured by the sensor (e.g., Air Quality, Water Quality) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "calibration_interval" TEXT /* Interval for sensor calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the sensor */,
  "maintenance_interval" TEXT /* Interval at which the sensor requires maintenance */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_parameter_measured FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_measured") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "value" REAL /* Measured value */,
  "difference" REAL /* Difference from baseline value */,
  "quality_index" REAL /* Quality index of the measurement */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the measurement */,
  "baseline_value" REAL /* Baseline value for the parameter measured */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the value */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used for the measurement */,
  "sensor_location" TEXT /* Specific location of the sensor within the station, if applicable */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, external feed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used to access the data */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_records" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "calibrated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the calibration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the calibration process */,
  "calibration_type" TEXT /* Type of calibration performed (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration */,
  "calibration_result" TEXT /* Result of the calibration (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "next_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_records_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., air, water, weather) */,
  "baseline_value" REAL /* Baseline value for the parameter */,
  "threshold_values" TEXT /* Threshold values for the parameter (e.g., minimum, maximum, warning levels) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the parameter data (e.g., sensor, external feed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)
